description: You are a rotoscope artist at an animation studio. Your task is to trace a reference video to create a matching animation. Import the reference image sequence from '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/bounce_ref/' (frames bounce.0001.png to bounce.0024.png) and create a visible outline tracing the ball's position on at least Frame 1, Frame 12, and Frame 24. Render the scene, including both the reference and your trace, as a PNG sequence to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/rotoscope_test/'.
